brief_title: An Study of Patients With Ph- Chromosome-negative Relapsed or Refractory Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia in the US
official_title: An Observational Study of Patients With Philadelphia Chromosome-negative Relapsed or Refractory Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia in the US
brief_summary: A retrospective chart review study of Philadelphia chromosome-negative R/R ALL patients in the US.

interventions.name: Other
interventions.description: No intervention other than routine medical care

eligibility.criteria:
Inclusion Criteria

-Medical records of patients initiating treatment for Ph- R/R ALL at participating clinical centers in the US between January 2013 and March 2019 will be eligible for inclusion.

Exclusion Criteria

* Medical records of patients with Ph+ ALL will be excluded.
* If informed consent is required, medical records of patients who do not provide informed consent will be excluded.

primary_outcomes.measure: Treatment patterns in patients with Ph- R/R ALL
Drug utilization in patients with Ph- R/R ALL
Healthcare resource utilization in patients with Ph- R/R ALL
